raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current focus areas","name":"What's been most on your mind at work lately?","description":"Opens the conversation by letting Priya share her own focus or concerns.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Refactor recognition","name":"How did the team recognition for the payments refactor land with you?","description":"Checks if the recognition for the refactor felt appropriate and meaningful to Priya.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Energy check","name":"What might be contributing to feeling a bit flat this week?","description":"Explores potential reasons behind Priya's quieter energy levels post-launch.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Mentoring interest","name":"What would a meaningful mentoring opportunity look like for you right now?","description":"Probes Priya's interest in mentoring and what she envisions it to be.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Post-launch focus","name":"After the payments refactor, where do you personally want to direct your energy next?","description":"Explores Priya's personal priorities and interest post-refactor.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Upcoming projects","name":"What kind of project would you want to take on next quarter?","description":"Allows Priya to express her preferences for future project involvement.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Manager support needs","name":"What support do you need from me as projects evolve?","description":"Ensures Priya feels supported and can express any needs for managerial support.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Billing rewrite concerns","name":"What concerns do you have about any upcoming projects that could slow us down later?","description":"Surfaces potential issues or concerns Priya might have regarding future projects.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Stretch opportunities","name":"Where do you see the biggest stretch for your skills in the upcoming months?","description":"Identifies areas where Priya feels she can grow or is challenged.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Next steps","name":"What's the first concrete thing you want to have moved by our next conversation?","description":"Concludes the check-in by focusing on Priya's next steps and commitments.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
